title: AWS EC2 and Scaling Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Amazon EC2 virtual servers and auto scaling.

questions.question: Regarding DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Amazon EC2 (Elastic Compute Cloud)'?
options: Providing flexible and scalable virtual servers—or 'instances'—in the cloud for your application project

questions.question: Which AWS service is used to automatically adjust your project's number of EC2 instances as intended?
